title: vaccinium cespitosum
intro: Vaccinium cespitosum, also known as dwarf bilberry or small bilberry, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant is rich in anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Vaccinium cespitosum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-diabetic and anti-obesity effects. In herbal preparations, Vaccinium cespitosum is often used to make jams, jellies, and teas, and it can also be consumed as a raw fruit or dried as a supplement.
